message:
feat(python): numpy.expm1 wrapper parity (franken_numpy-c8jl)

Adds a passthrough wrapper for numpy.expm1(x) — exp(x)-1 with
greater precision near zero. Test covers expm1(0)=0,
expm1(1)≈e-1, very small x where expm1(x)≈x with ~1e-25 precision,
1-D mixed-sign array, integer input promoted to float with dtype
parity, 2-D array, and complex input matching numpy.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
